text.title: devops-elk-queries-alerting Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for devops-elk-queries-alerting as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using message: "*error*" instead of level: ERROR for finding errors in structured logs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Wildcard queries on the message text field bypass the inverted index and scan all documents, causing query times 10-100x slower than keyword field lookups on the level field.
